name: NATURAL HEALTH TRENDS CORP
business: Natural Health Trends Corp. is an international direct-selling and e-commerce company that sells personal care, wellness, and quality of life products under the NHT Global brand. The company's subsidiaries have active physical presence in the Americas, Greater China, Southeast Asia, South Korea, Japan, India, and Europe, and it also operates in Russia and Kazakhstan through a local service provider. Products are sold primarily to independent members for personal consumption and resale.
sellsTo: Americas (United States, Canada, Cayman Islands, Mexico, Peru, Colombia)

exposures.sentence: Measures 17+ critical biomarkers across multiple key areas of your well-being including your cardiovascular, hormonal, inflammatory, metabolic, and nutritional health.

catalysts.event: Realization of annualized cost savings from restructuring plan
catalysts.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, we were substantially complete with the major restructuring initiatives and expect to realize a significant portion of the associated $1.5 million annualized cost savings during 2026, with the remainder expected to be realized thereafter, primarily due to the timing of certain facility-related actions.
